title: Better HUD icons
description: Improves the outdated looking hud icons
body:
Improves all the outdated looking hud icons.
Most of these textures have not been updated for more than 10 years, even though there are similar textures that have a more modern look, so I decided to use some of those textures to update the old ones

---
